title: SR 24-3 / CA 24-4: CA 24-4:  Interagency Guidance on Reconsiderations of Value of Residential Real Estate Valuations
title_normalized: CA 24-4:  Interagency Guidance on Reconsiderations of Value of Residential Real Estate Valuations
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 24-3 / CA 24-4
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance is relevant for all financial institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
